title: CT8 legal branch run — Finite-state pumping
description: Concrete schema for one legal execution branch of CT8 (Finite-state pumping). A conforming run may use only CT8 node IDs and records, must start at an entry node, follow declared transitions with repetition only on declared loops, align every proof record with its visited node ID, and finish with a matching outcome.

tacticId.description: Required discriminator for a branch execution of CT8 (Finite-state pumping); must equal "CT8".

visitedNodeIds.description: Required execution-order path for one actual CT8 (Finite-state pumping) branch. Every item must be a concrete ID from CT8.N01 through CT8.N18; the first must be an entry node, adjacent IDs must follow a declared CT8 transition, and repeats are allowed only on a declared loop.

nodeRecords.description: Required discharge records aligned position-for-position with visitedNodeIds for this CT8 run. The array must have the same length as visitedNodeIds; every item must match one concrete CT8 node-record schema and its nodeId must equal the corresponding visited ID.

x-semanticValidationRules: validate visitedNodeIds as a path in the corresponding tactic transition graph
